title: Keflavik Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Keflavik, with a Z-Score of -3.77. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Keflavik are extremely cold, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The high wind speed of 24.1 km/h is exacerbating the cold temperatures, making it feel even colder. 
 The relative humidity of 79% is also contributing to the uncomfortable conditions, with no heat relief in sight as the CDD is 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize disruptions.
